description: Sample payloads for POST /track (GrowthBook Ingestion API). Send the `events` array as the request body, or POST a single object from the array. Query param client_key is required (must start with sdk-).

schema_evolution_notes.properties: Flat primitive keys on each event's `properties` object are additively registered on the forwarder Avro `properties` nested record as new keys appear across events. Nested objects are ignored for evolution — use flat keys only.
schema_evolution_notes.attributes: All org targeting attributes (including hash identifiers like user_id) are stored in the forwarder Avro `attributes` nested record. Inner fields are pre-seeded from org attributeSchema on provision and grow additively when new keys appear in live events (same evolution model as `properties`).

event_evolution: Event 1 — Baseline Experiment Viewed: only experimentId/variationId in properties; attributes logged_in + plan.
Event 2 — Add properties cta_label, variation_index, is_new_user. Add attributes locale + country (plan retained).
Event 3 — Remove cta_label, is_new_user; add revenue_usd, tags. Drop plan/locale/country from attributes; add cart_value, referral_source.
Event 4 — Feature Evaluated (docs shape). Add properties load_time_ms, cache_hit. Drop cart_value/referral_source; add company_size.
Event 5 — Custom Purchase. New property keys amount/currency/product_id/quantity/coupon_applied. Drop company_size; add user_tier, ab_bucket.
